creator: lawrance@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Sorry, we don't support building ports with the -j flag. 

This issue/question pops up every now and then.  If you are interested 
in pursuing it, you may be interested in this recent thread on the 
FreeBSD ports mailing list: 

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2006-October/036148.html
